disclaimer: Market schedules can shift for weather and holidays; verify weekly updates before visiting.

markets.name: Lafayette Farmers & Artisans Market
markets.expect: Local produce, meats, baked goods, prepared foods, crafts

markets.name: Hub City Farmers Market
markets.expect: Fresh vegetables, jams, local seafood, artisan goods

markets.name: Jockey Lot Produce Market
markets.expect: Bulk produce, plants, local vendors, flea-market finds

markets.name: Teche Area Farmers Market
markets.expect: After-work produce pickup, honey, homemade breads

markets.name: Youngsville Farmers Market
markets.expect: Family-friendly market with produce, sweets, food vendors

markets.name: Broussard Community Market
markets.location: Broussard City Hall, 310 E Main St, Broussard
markets.expect: Small local growers, eggs, value-added goods

markets.name: Sunset Open Air Market
markets.expect: Produce + antiques + handmade soaps and preserves

markets.name: Abbeville Fresh Market
markets.expect: Regional produce, local rice products, baked treats

markets.name: Breaux Bridge Farmers Market
markets.expect: Local produce, Cajun food vendors, crafts
